ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the college */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the college */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the college (e.g., D-I, D-II) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the college belongs to */,
  "elo" REAL /* Elo rating for performance evaluation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the college */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "sports_offered" TEXT /* List of sports offered by the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the college's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing college */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the team statistics */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Wins in home games */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Wins in away games */,
  "neutral_wins" INTEGER /* Wins in neutral venue games */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Losses in home games */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Losses in away games */,
  "neutral_losses" INTEGER /* Losses in neutral venue games */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins achieved by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses incurred by the team */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_stats" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the conference */,
  "top_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top-performing team in the conference */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins recorded in the conference */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses recorded in the conference */,
  "average_win_pct" REAL /* Average winning percentage of the conference teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the player belongs to */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the player statistics are recorded */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "sets_won" INTEGER /* Total sets won by the player */,
  "sets_lost" INTEGER /* Total sets lost by the player */,
  "points_won" INTEGER /* Total points won by the player */,
  "points_lost" INTEGER /* Total points lost by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_loss_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each win-loss record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing college */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the win-loss record is recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins against this opponent */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses against this opponent */,
  "record_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage against this opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_loss_records_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_loss_records_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_per_game" (
  "ppg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each points per game record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the record */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the points per game are recorded */,
  "points_game" INTEGER /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_set" INTEGER /* Average points scored per set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ppg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_per_game_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the metrics */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "soo" INTEGER /* Strength of Outcome (SOO) for the college */,
  "sos" INTEGER /* Strength of Schedule (SOS) for the college */,
  "cinco_wins" INTEGER /* Total cinco wins */,
  "cinco_losses" INTEGER /* Total cinco losses */,
  "cinco_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage in cinco matches */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* National rank of the college in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the coach is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "years_with_team" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
